/CAL:REMOVAL GPS/DAWT/X:CONFLICT ATTORNEY APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANTIS IN COMPLIANT WITH HER CONDITIONS OF RELEASE BY ACM/X:COURT IS REQUESTING FROM PTD A REPORT AT THE NEXT COURT APPEARANCE/CONTD: PHC RE INTERVIEW WITH PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVER & E,M,/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 02-25-21 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/INTC/EMMOD:DEFENDANT WILL HAVE A CURFEW AND MUST REMAIN IN THE PREMISES LOCATEDAT 10862 PEARLS ST, OAKLAND, CA FROM 6PM - 8AM/SAORD/SA4:THE TENDERLOIN BORDERED BY O'FARRELL ST, POLK ST, MARKET ST, POWELL ST SF CA/WS/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE OF 01-28-21 IN M09 FORPCD MOTION/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPOSITION/INTC/STWPX/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXTBUSINESS DAY/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED ON HOME DETENTION AND IS TO REMIAN IN HER PREMISES, EXCEPT FOR PARTICIPATING IN EMPLOYMENT AND CHILD CARE/WS/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION MOTION/DOP/
